zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Pudsay於大約1339年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親John Pudsay33歲，母親Katherine Wigglesworth29歲。他於大約1351年與Elizabeth Layton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年12月在英國越可爾巴福斯 霍爾享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pudsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Pudsay was born about 1339, in Yorkshire, England, his father, John Pudsay, was 33 and his mother, Katherine Wigglesworth, was 29. He married Elizabeth Layton about 1351, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in December 1397, in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Pudsay est né environ 1339, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Pudsay, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wigglesworth, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Layton environ 1351, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1397, à Barforth Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Pudsay(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pudsay(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Wigglesworth(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Layton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 12월 영국 요르크실르 바포스 홀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Pudsay родился около 1339 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Pudsay было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wigglesworth, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Layton около 1351 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1397 г. в местности барфорт холл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
